EXPERT.speaker: EXPERT
EXPERT.why: Frame shows a middle-aged Indian man in a suit speaking authoritatively into a podcast mic. Ankit is a middle-aged standard (Indian) male with a natural, conversational, engaging tone — perfect for a seasoned 25-yr market expert delivering measured, confident English analysis.
EXPERT.name: Ankit - Conversational Hindi Narration

HOST.speaker: HOST
HOST.why: Frame shows a young Indian man (20s) in a black tee hosting a podcast. Bunty is a young standard (Indian) male podcast host — casual, confident, and conversational, ideal for the curious interviewer asking relatable buyer questions.
HOST.name: Bunty - Fun Podcast Host

VO.speaker: VO
VO.why: Off-screen narration over a gold price chart needs a polished, brand-grade Indian male voice. Aakash Aryan is a charismatic standard (Indian) male advertisement voice, distinct from the expert and host, well-suited to punchy data-driven VO and a follow CTA.
VO.name: Aakash Aryan - Charismatic Mass Ads
